title: Technical Writer
jd_text:
TechWrite Inc. specializes in creating high-quality technical documentation for software products. We are looking for a Technical Writer to join our remote team. This position is fully remote, allowing you to work from the comfort of your home.

**Responsibilities:**
- Create and maintain documentation for node.js applications.
- Collaborate with developers to understand product features and functionality.
- Develop user guides, API documentation, and online help.

**Requirements:**
- Strong writing and editing skills.
- Familiarity with Node.js is a must.
- Ability to understand complex technical concepts and translate them into clear documentation.
- Nice to have: Experience with Markdown and documentation tools.

**Benefits:**
- Competitive salary starting at £100,000 annually.
- Work from anywhere with flexible hours.
- Access to training and professional development resources.
arr_raw: This position is fully remote, allowing you to work from the comfort of your home.
label: good_fit

title: Technical Writer
jd_text:
DocuTech Corp specializes in creating comprehensive documentation for software products, ensuring clarity and usability for end-users. Our team values creativity and precision in technical communication. 

We are looking for a Technical Writer to join our remote team. You will be responsible for creating clear and concise documentation, including user manuals, installation guides, and API documentation. Responsibilities include:
- Collaborating with developers to understand product functionalities.
- Creating and maintaining documentation for Node.js applications.
- Editing and proofreading technical content for accuracy.

**Requirements:**
- Strong writing skills and attention to detail.
- Familiarity with Node.js and basic programming concepts.
- Nice to have: experience with documentation tools like Markdown or Confluence.

**Benefits:**
- Fully remote working opportunity.
- Competitive salary between £60,000-£80,000.
- Flexible hours and a supportive team environment.
label: maybe

title: Technical Writer
jd_text:
Innovative Authors is a creative agency that specializes in technical documentation and content creation. We aim to bridge the gap between technology and user understanding through clear, concise writing.

**Responsibilities:**
- Create and maintain technical documentation for software products.
- Collaborate with engineers to gather information on product features.
- Ensure that documentation meets quality standards and is user-friendly.

**Requirements:**
- Strong writing skills with experience in technical writing.
- Proficient in NodeJS and Javascript/Typescript.
- Experience with AI/ML concepts is required.
- Ability to work independently in a remote setting.

**Benefits:**
- Salary range of £55,000-£70,000.
- 100% remote position with flexible hours.
- Health and wellness benefits.
- Opportunities for career advancement.

*Note: Familiarity with graphic design tools is a nice to have.*
label: good_fit
